payments.title: Payments
payments.subtitle: Track rent payments and follow up on late payments
payments.emptyDescription: Payments will appear here once leases are active.
payments.ignoreDescription: This payment will be excluded from rent tracking and automated reminders. You can restore it at any time.
payments.waiveCharges: Waive all charges during this period
payments.deductionReasonPlaceholder: e.g. agreed rent reduction, defect compensation...

leases.emptyDescription: Create your first lease to start tracking payments.
leases.saveError: Failed to save. Please check your connection.
leases.coTenantsNote: Multiple tenants selected - they will be added as co-tenants on the lease.
leases.indexationDescription: Automatically adjust rent based on the Belgian health index each year.

indexation.title: Rent Indexation
indexation.subtitle: Automatic rent adjustments based on the health index
indexation.epcWarningDescription: Brussels and Flanders have EPC-based restrictions on rent indexation. Properties with a poor energy label may have limited or no indexation allowed.
indexation.emptyDescription: Indexation calculations will appear here when leases have anniversary dates approaching.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure your payment follow-up and preferences
settings.automatedFollowUpDescription: Automatically check for overdue payments 3 times per day (00:00, 10:00, 17:00) and send escalating reminders.
settings.escalationDescription: Configure when each reminder level is triggered after the payment due date.
settings.finalNoticeDescription: Includes a PDF overview with payment details and interest charges.
settings.chargeInterestDescription: Interest will be calculated and shown in the final notice PDF.
settings.subject: Subject
settings.landlordReportDescription: Receive automatic email reports summarising the payment status of all your tenants.
settings.reportScheduleDescription: Choose which days of the month you want to receive a payment overview report.
settings.skipIfAllPaid: Skip report if all payments are received
settings.skipIfAllPaidDescription: Do not send a report email when every tenant has paid on time. You will only be notified when there are outstanding or overdue payments.
settings.templateLanguageDescription: Emails are sent in the tenant's preferred language. Customize templates per language below.
settings.bankAccountsDescription: Manage the bank accounts used for rent collection.
settings.noBankAccountsDescription: Add a bank account to start collecting rent payments.

landing.heroSubtitle: Automate rent collection, payment reminders, and rent indexation. Built for Belgian landlords, with full EPC compliance and SEPA direct debit.
landing.agplNotice: Licensed under AGPL-3.0. Self-host for free or use our managed hosting.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to manage your properties
landing.featuresSubtitle: Purpose-built for the Belgian rental market with full legal compliance.
landing.featurePaymentsDesc: Track rent payments, late fees, and generate structured communications automatically.
landing.featureIndexationDesc: Automatic rent calculations based on the Belgian health index with EPC restrictions.
landing.featureRemindersDesc: 3-step escalation: friendly, formal, final notice with PDF overview and interest.
landing.featureEpcDesc: Automatic Brussels and Flanders EPC-based indexation restrictions built in.
landing.featureTenantsDesc: Full tenant profiles with language preferences, national register, and communication history.
landing.featureMultilingualDesc: Dutch, French, German, and English. Emails sent in each tenant's preferred language.
landing.featureLeasesDesc: All Belgian lease types supported: 9-year, short, lifetime, student, and commercial.
landing.featureMaintenanceDesc: Automatic reminders for fire alarms, heating maintenance and chimney sweeps. Never miss an inspection.
landing.featureSepaDesc: Collect rent automatically via GoCardless SEPA Core. No more chasing bank transfers.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Start for free with self-hosting, or let us handle the infrastructure.
landing.planStarterDesc: Perfect for a single rental property.
landing.planStandardDesc: For landlords with a small portfolio.
landing.planProDesc: For property managers and large portfolios.
landing.pricingSelfHost: Prefer to self-host? Rentular is free and OpenSource under AGPL-3.0.
landing.comparisonSubtitle: See how we stack up against other Belgian property management tools.
landing.indexationRoiTitle: Indexation alone pays for itself many times over
landing.indexationRoiDescription: Most landlords forget or delay their yearly rent indexation, leaving hundreds of euros on the table. Rentular tracks every lease anniversary and calculates indexed rents automatically. The savings from a single indexation far outweigh the yearly cost of the software.
landing.indexationRoiExampleDesc: Typical yearly indexation increase per lease (at 3-4% health index)
landing.openSourceCta: Rentular is and will always be OpenSource. Inspect the code, contribute features, or self-host on your own infrastructure. No vendor lock-in, ever.

maintenance.title: Maintenance
maintenance.subtitle: Periodic maintenance and inspections for your properties
maintenance.emptyDescription: Add periodic tasks or click 'Auto-generate' to create tasks for all your leases.
maintenance.uncoveredLeases: {count, plural, one {# lease} other {# leases}} without maintenance tasks
maintenance.uncoveredLeasesHint: Click 'Auto-generate' to automatically add fire alarms, heating maintenance and chimney sweeps.

support.title: Rentular Support
support.subtitle: We're here to help
support.welcomeMessage: Hi! How can we help you today? Ask us about billing, features, or report an issue.
support.autoReply: Thank you for your message. Our support team will get back to you shortly.
support.offlineMessage: We're currently offline. Your message has been saved and we'll respond as soon as possible.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Rentular ("we", "us", "our") is committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard information when you use our property management platform, in compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
privacy.controllerText: Rentular is the data controller responsible for your personal data. We are based in Belgium and subject to Belgian and European data protection law.
privacy.dataCollectedIntro: We collect and process the following categories of personal data:
privacy.dataName: Name (first and last name) of landlords and tenants
privacy.dataNationalRegister: National register number (rijksregisternummer) for tenant identification
privacy.dataIban: IBAN bank account number for rent collection
privacy.dataProperty: Property information (address, cadastral reference, EPC data)
privacy.dataLease: Lease details (type, duration, rent amounts, charges)
privacy.purposeIntro: We process your data for the following purposes:
privacy.purposeManagement: Managing rental properties, leases, and tenant relationships
privacy.purposePayments: Processing and tracking rent payments, including SEPA direct debits
privacy.purposeCommunication: Sending payment reminders and lease-related communications
privacy.purposeIndexation: Calculating annual rent indexation based on the Belgian health index
privacy.purposeLegal: Complying with legal obligations (tax, accounting, Belgian rental law)
privacy.legalBasisIntro: We process your personal data based on the following legal grounds under Article 6 GDPR:
privacy.legalBasisContract: Processing is necessary to provide the Rentular service you signed up for.
privacy.legalBasisInterest: Sending payment reminders, generating reports, and improving the service.
privacy.legalBasisObligation: Complying with Belgian tax and accounting requirements.
privacy.retentionText: We retain your personal data for as long as your account is active and as needed to provide our services. After account deletion, we may retain certain data for up to 10 years to comply with Belgian legal and accounting obligations. Payment records may be retained as required by tax law. You can request deletion of your account and data at any time.
privacy.rightsIntro: Under the GDPR, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
privacy.rightAccess: Right of access - request a copy of your personal data
privacy.rightRectification: Right to rectification - correct inaccurate or incomplete data
privacy.rightErasure: Right to erasure - request deletion of your data (subject to legal retention periods)
privacy.rightPortability: Right to data portability - receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format
privacy.rightRestriction: Right to restriction - request limited processing of your data
privacy.rightObjection: Right to object - object to processing based on legitimate interest
privacy.rightsContact: To exercise any of these rights, contact us at privacy@rentular.com. We will respond within 30 days.
privacy.rightsAuthority: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the Belgian Data Protection Authority (Gegevensbeschermingsautoriteit / Autorité de protection des données).
privacy.cookiesText: Rentular uses essential cookies required for the application to function (authentication, session management, language preference). We do not use tracking or advertising cookies. No cookie consent banner is needed for strictly necessary cookies under the ePrivacy Directive.
privacy.thirdPartyIntro: We share data with the following third-party processors as necessary to operate the service:
privacy.thirdPartyGoCardless: - SEPA direct debit collection for rent payments
privacy.thirdPartyGdpr: All third-party processors are GDPR-compliant and process data under Data Processing Agreements (DPAs). Data may be transferred outside the EEA only with appropriate safeguards (Standard Contractual Clauses).
privacy.securityText: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data, including encryption in transit (TLS) and at rest, access controls, and regular security reviews. Rentular is open-source (AGPL-3.0), allowing independent security audits of the codebase.
privacy.changesText: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes via email or through the application. The "Last updated" date at the top reflects the most recent revision.
privacy.contactText: For any questions about this Privacy Policy or your personal data, contact us at

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your use of Rentular, a property management platform operated from Belgium. By creating an account or using the service, you agree to these Terms.
terms.serviceText: Rentular is a property management platform designed for Belgian landlords. It provides tools for managing rental properties, tenants, leases, payment tracking, rent indexation, SEPA direct debit collection, and automated payment reminders. The service is available as a hosted (SaaS) version and as self-hosted open-source software.
terms.accountIntro: When you create an account, you agree to:
terms.accountSecurity: Keep your login credentials secure and confidential
terms.accountNotify: Notify us immediately of any unauthorized access to your account
terms.accountAge: Be at least 18 years old to use the service
terms.useNoIllegal: Use the service for any unlawful purpose
terms.useNoAbuse: Upload false, misleading, or malicious content
terms.useNoInterference: Attempt to interfere with or disrupt the service
terms.useNoScraping: Scrape, crawl, or use automated tools to extract data from the service (unless via our API)
terms.ipText: Rentular's source code is licensed under the GNU Affero General Public License version 3.0 (AGPL-3.0). You may use, modify, and distribute the software in accordance with that license. The AGPL-3.0 requires that if you run a modified version of Rentular as a network service, you must make the source code of your modifications available to users. The Rentular name and logo are trademarks of Rentular.
terms.ipUserContent: You retain ownership of all data you enter into Rentular (property information, tenant data, lease details, etc.). We do not claim any intellectual property rights over your content.
terms.paymentStripe: Payments are processed securely via Stripe. We do not store your credit card details.
terms.paymentRecurring: Subscriptions are billed monthly. Your first 3 months are free.
terms.paymentChanges: We may adjust pricing with 30 days' notice. You can cancel before the change takes effect.
terms.paymentRefunds: No refunds for partial months. You can cancel at any time and continue using the service until the end of your billing period.
terms.paymentSelfHost: Self-hosted users can use Rentular free of charge under the AGPL-3.0 license. No payment is required for the self-hosted version.
terms.dataText: Your use of Rentular is also governed by our Privacy Policy, which explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal data. Please review it here:
terms.liabilityText: Rentular is provided "as is" and "as available". While we strive for accuracy and reliability, we do not guarantee that the service will be uninterrupted or error-free. We are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service.
terms.liabilityDisclaimer: In particular, Rentular does not provide legal, tax, or financial advice. Rent indexation calculations, payment tracking, and other features are tools to assist you, but you remain responsible for verifying their accuracy and compliance with applicable law.
terms.terminationText: You may close your account at any time through the settings page or by contacting us. We may suspend or terminate your account if you violate these Terms or fail to pay for the hosted service after reasonable notice.
terms.terminationData: Upon termination, you can export your data before your account is deleted. After deletion, we will remove your data in accordance with our Privacy Policy and applicable retention obligations.
terms.changesToTermsText: We may update these Terms from time to time. We will notify you of material changes at least 30 days in advance via email or in-app notification. Continued use of the service after the effective date constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.
terms.lawText: These Terms are governed by Belgian law. Any disputes will be submitted to the competent courts of Belgium. This does not affect your statutory consumer rights under EU law.
terms.contactText: For questions about these Terms, contact us at
